Video.summary: Ted and Dusty infiltrate a band of outlaws to get close to Mr. Gentry, the man who murdered Ted's father.
Video.title: West of the Divide

Video.summary: Townsfolk turn against their sheriff (Harry Carey) because of his outlaw son (Edward Norris).
Video.title: Wagon Trail

Video.summary: The Three Mesquiteers (Robert Livingston, Ray Corrigan, Max Terhune) discover a painted horse and a fandango dancer.
Video.title: Hit the Saddle

Video.summary: Three men (Richard Dix, Leo Carrillo, Preston Foster) start a big cattle ranch in post-Civil War Texas, but greed destroys it.
Video.title: American Empire

Video.summary: President Grant helps a cavalry major (Dale Robertson) condemned for helping Dakota Chief Sitting Bull (J. Carrol Naish).
Video.title: Sitting Bull

Video.summary: Marshal John Travers investigates the murder of a town's sheriff, makes it his mission to restore order to the town and bring down a bandit called the Shadow.
Video.title: The Star Packer

Video.summary: An Easterner (George O'Brien) finds rustlers and a sweetheart (Irene Hervey) on the ranch he inherited out West.
Video.title: The Dude Ranger

Video.summary: A singing-cowboy congressman (Roy Rogers) goes to Washington to save ranchers from a power dam.
Video.title: Under Western Stars

Video.summary: A federal investigator (Tim McCoy) poses as an outlaw to catch a gang of counterfeiters which has kidnapped a government engraver.
Video.title: Phantom Ranger

Video.summary: Agent Saunders (John Wayne) becomes partners with Fay (Cecelia Parker) to help her fight off a gang run by a local land grabber.
Video.title: Riders of Destiny

Video.summary: Red Ryder (Jim Bannon) KOs a fight racket with sidekick Little Beaver (Little Brown Jug) and a new friend.
Video.title: The Cowboy and the Prizefighter

Video.summary: An Oregon Trail scout (Randolph Scott) woos a member (Gail Patrick) of his wagon train in Indian country.
Video.title: Wagon Wheels

Video.summary: Texas brothers (Robert Preston, Robert Sterling) feud over land and cattle, with a younger brother between them.
Video.title: The Sundowners

Video.summary: Former deputies plan on robbing a gold shipment after their brother is killed.
Video.title: The Dalton Gang

Video.summary: Frankie befriends an outlaw after his gang robs the train.
Video.title: Sam Bass

Video.summary: While investigating a train robbery, Matt Clark learns about Johnny Ringo; Frankie gets a job doing undercover work; Matt tracks Johnny down.
Video.title: Johnny Ringo

Video.summary: Cisco and Pancho set out to prove that a notorious outlaw has murdered a U.S. marshal.
Video.title: Haven for Heavies

Video.summary: A dog leads Cisco and Pancho to his murdered master's gold mine where they become trapped by the victim's killers.
Video.title: Dog Story

Video.summary: Detective Matt Clark and his partner Frankie head to Tombstone, Arizona to find Doc Holliday with suspicion that Holliday is involved in the gang activity there; starring Jim Davis and Mary Castle.
Video.title: Doc Holiday

Video.summary: Cisco proves that the man being held in jail on a murder charge is not the actual murderer.
Video.title: Confession for Money

Video.summary: A respectable businessman traps an elderly man into a rustling ring scheme that Pancho and Cisco later discover.
Video.title: The Old Bum

Video.summary: Little Snowbird falls into a deep trance after Hawkeye presents her with a doll.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: The Indian Doll

Video.summary: Hawkeye and Chingachcook match their wits against two thieves who have phony identities.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: The Contest

Video.summary: Freedom of the press is threatened when the editor is framed for murder.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: The Printer

Video.summary: Cressing claims to have a royal grant giving him ownership of the town.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: The Royal Grant

Video.summary: Hawkeye and Chingachgook escort young Greg to the boy's Aunt Emma and Uncle Mort; Greg inherits his parents valuable mine which makes him a target.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: The Truant

Video.summary: A young lieutenant seeks blind vengeance for the brutal murders of his parents by warmongering Shawnee.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: Revenge

Video.summary: Hawkeye has tracked outlaw Simon Girty to Morristown but he and Chingachgook are turned away and told that the town is closed due to an outbreak of the black plague; Hawkeye decides to sneak in and see for himself.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: Morristown Story

Video.summary: Someone is selling illegal guns to the Indians and the townspeople blame gunsmith Eben Cotten.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: The Long Rifles
